Waypoints.name: Novel Engineering of Swarm Technologies (NEST) 200C
Waypoints.desc: The lab researches swarm robotics with a focus on coordination algorithms, software engineering, and human–swarm interaction.
Waypoints.modelDesc: A friendly nursing assistant robot designed to help with patient care and monitoring.

Waypoints.name: Safe Autonomy and Intelligence Lab (SAIL) 200F
Waypoints.desc: The SAIL Lab researches safety-critical control and trustworthy ML to create autonomous systems that are both intelligent and certifiable.

Waypoints.name: Manipulation and Environmental Robotics Lab (MER) 200D
Waypoints.desc: The MER Lab advances robotic manipulation through vision, control, and machine learning, tackling environmental tasks like recycling and leading benchmarking in dexterous manipulation and active vision.
